parameters.query:
SELECT t.id, t.quantity, t.performed_by, t.remarks,
       t.transaction_time, t.item_code, t.item_name,
       dl.line_num, d.id AS document_id, d.wms_status AS doc_wms_status
FROM wms.wms_documents d
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_transactions t ON t.document_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN wms.wms_document_lines dl ON t.line_id = dl.id
WHERE d.company_code = $1
  AND d.doc_type = 'PI'
  AND d.doc_number = $2
ORDER BY t.transaction_time DESC

-- ⚠️ 用户需要手动配置MS SQL凭证并调整此SQL
SELECT
    o.DocNum, o.DocEntry, o.ItemCode AS productCode,
    ip.ItemName AS productName,
    o.PlannedQty, o.CmpltQty AS completedQty,
    o.Status, o.DueDate,
    l.LineNum, l.ItemCode, i.ItemName, i.InvntryUom AS uom,
    l.BaseQty, l.IssuedQty, l.PlannedQty AS linePlannedQty,
    l.Warehouse AS whsCode, w.WhsName
FROM OWOR o
JOIN WOR1 l ON o.DocEntry = l.DocEntry
LEFT JOIN OITM i ON l.ItemCode = i.ItemCode
LEFT JOIN OITM ip ON o.ItemCode = ip.ItemCode
LEFT JOIN OWHS w ON l.Warehouse = w.WhsCode
WHERE o.DocNum = {{ parseInt($('Extract Params').item.json.docnum) }}
  AND l.ItemType = 4
ORDER BY l.LineNum
